creator: t-harada@den.ohu-u.ac.jp
text:
Dear glewis@ and freebsd-java members,

I have added these sentences bescribed below in /usr/local/etc/ports.conf:
java/openjdk7: CFLAGS=-D__STDC_CONSTANT_MACROS=1
java/openjdk7: CXXFLAGS=-D__STDC_CONSTANT_MACROS=1
Then I have re-compiled devel/openjdk7 using portmaster.
No build error has occurred and java/openjdk7 has been successfully 
installed.
Build error seems to be fixed for me.

Sincerely Yours,
Takuya
